'''ganava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobori|nobori]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobori|nobori]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ganava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gænævæth|gænævæth]] || [[word:gænævæj|gænævæj]] || [[word:gænævæsh|gænævæsh]] || [[word:gænævæ|gænævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gananavath|gananavath]] || [[word:gananavaj|gananavaj]] || [[word:gananavash|gananavash]] || [[word:gananava|gananava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganavath|ganavath]] || [[word:ganavaj|ganavaj]] || [[word:ganavash|ganavash]] || [[word:ganava|ganava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganafvath|ganafvath]] || [[word:ganafvaj|ganafvaj]] || [[word:ganafvash|ganafvash]] || [[word:ganafvaf|ganafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ganavatha|ganavatha]] || [[word:ganavaja|ganavaja]] || [[word:ganavasha|ganavasha]] || [[word:ganavaka|ganavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ganavath|ganavath]] || [[word:ganavaj|ganavaj]] || [[word:ganavash|ganavash]] || [[word:ganava|ganava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ganavathal|ganavathal]] || [[word:ganavajal|ganavajal]] || [[word:ganavashal|ganavashal]] || [[word:ganavakal|ganavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ganavathatha|ganavathatha]] || [[word:ganavajaja|ganavajaja]] || [[word:ganavashasha|ganavashasha]] || [[word:ganavaka|ganavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ganavathan|ganavathan]] || [[word:ganavajan|ganavajan]] || [[word:ganavashan|ganavashan]] || [[word:ganavakan|ganavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ganavathaoro|ganavathaoro]] || [[word:ganavajaoro|ganavajaoro]] || [[word:ganavashaoro|ganavashaoro]] || [[word:ganavakaoro|ganavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
